questions.title: Q1.Palindrome Number Check
questions.description: Complete the logic to check whether the given number is a palindrome or not.
questions.starterCode:
num = 121
temp = num
rev = 0

while num > 0:
    rem = num % 10

    rev = [Blank]

    num = num // 10

if temp == rev:
    print("Palindrome")
else:
    print("Not Palindrome")
